method_en: How crowded is the AI trade — and who is already fully invested: institutions, retail, leveraged money? Crowdedness does not time the top, but it sets the violence of the drawdown and narrows the exit. This card fills the blind spot /flows itself declares (no direct institutional-positioning data in the free tier) with genuinely free official sources: CFTC COT, AAII, NAAIM, FINRA margin debt, CBOE put/call, plus yfinance proxies. Curated player map (L1/L2) + live positioning quant with 3-year-percentile framing (L3) + Claude synthesis with rules fallback (L4/L5). Percentiles on curated bands are estimates. Not investment advice.
method_zh: 這個 AI 交易有多擁擠——誰已經滿倉:機構、散戶、還是槓桿資金?擁擠度不能算出頂在哪一天,但決定回檔的猛烈度、也決定出口有多窄。這張卡直接補掉 /flows 自己聲明的盲點(免費層沒有機構部位直接數據),用真正免費的官方數據填上:CFTC COT、AAII、NAAIM、FINRA 融資餘額、CBOE put/call,加上 yfinance 代理。策展玩家地圖(L1/L2)+ 帶三年百分位框架的即時部位量化(L3)+ Claude 合成與規則後備(L4/L5)。策展區間上的百分位屬估計值。非投資建議。

indicators.name_zh: COT — 那斯達克投機淨部位
indicators.note_en: CFTC legacy COT (futures only), Socrata keyless API; Tue as-of, Fri publish. Live refresh computes the TRUE 3y percentile from fetched history; the seed percentile uses the curated band (EST). Futures only — excludes the cash & options complex.
indicators.note_zh: CFTC 傳統 COT(僅期貨),Socrata 免 key API;週二基準、週五發布。即時刷新會用抓到的歷史算「真」3 年百分位;種子百分位用策展區間(估計)。僅涵蓋期貨——不含現貨與選擇權部位。

indicators.note_en: Weekly Thursday survey; small self-selected sample (see blind spots). Seed = bulls 41.6% / bears 33.2%. Lukewarm retail vs full institutions is itself a signal.
indicators.note_zh: 每週四發布;小樣本自選問卷(見盲點)。種子 = 看多 41.6% / 看空 33.2%。散戶溫吞、機構滿倉,本身就是訊號。

indicators.note_en: Weekly Wednesday; active managers' self-reported exposure, can exceed 100 with leverage. Best-effort live fetch from naaim.org; seed fallback.
indicators.note_zh: 每週三發布;主動經理人自報曝險,槓桿下可超過 100。即時層 best-effort 抓 naaim.org,失敗退回種子。

indicators.note_en: Official FINRA monthly statistics — but published with a ~2-month lag: the 2026-04-30 print (~$1,190B) is the freshest available on 2026-07-02. NO live fetch; curated seed only, refreshed by hand when FINRA publishes.
indicators.note_zh: FINRA 官方月度統計——但發布落後約兩個月:2026-07-02 能拿到的最新值是 2026-04-30(約 $1,190B)。不做即時抓取;僅策展種子,FINRA 發布後人工更新。

indicators.note_en: Inverted for crowding: LOW ratio = call-chasing = crowded. Best-effort scrape of CBOE daily stats; seed = curated 10-day average.
indicators.note_zh: 計分反向:比值越低 = 追買權 = 越擁擠。即時層 best-effort 抓 CBOE 日統計;種子為策展 10 日均值。

indicators.note_en: PROXY — reliably live via yfinance (^VIX, ^VIX3M). Inverted: deep contango (low ratio) = complacency = crowded carry; ≥0.95 flips to a CRACK tell (vol-target trigger wire).
indicators.note_zh: 代理指標——經 yfinance(^VIX、^VIX3M)可靠即時。計分反向:深度正價差(低比值)= 自滿 = 擁擠套利;≥0.95 轉為「裂紋」訊號(vol-target 引線)。

indicators.name_zh: QQQ/SPY 成交金額比(20 日)
indicators.note_en: PROXY — attention/turnover tilt toward the tech complex, not a position. Reliably live via yfinance. Curated band is an estimate (T3).
indicators.note_zh: 代理指標——衡量注意力/換手向科技集群傾斜,不是部位本身。yfinance 可靠即時。策展區間為估計(T3)。

indicators.name_zh: SOXX 相對量能(3 月 ÷ 1 年)
indicators.note_en: PROXY — how much of the market's attention sits on semis specifically. Reliably live via yfinance. Curated band is an estimate (T3).
indicators.note_zh: 代理指標——市場注意力有多少壓在半導體上。yfinance 可靠即時。策展區間為估計(T3)。

composite.verdict_en: CROWDED — the marginal buyer is mostly in; drawdown violence is pre-loaded
composite.verdict_zh: CROWDED — 邊際買家大多已進場;回檔的猛烈度已預先裝填

nuance.desc_en: Crowding is still building (positioning trends up) and fewer than the required crack tells are on — momentum intact, but every new buyer moves the future seller queue up one notch.
nuance.desc_zh: 擁擠仍在累積(部位趨勢向上),裂紋訊號未達門檻——動能還在,但每多一個新買家,未來的賣壓隊列就往前排一格。

crack_tells.detail_en: CCC−IG decompression flag ON on the /credit card — the softest funding layer repricing while positioning is full.
crack_tells.detail_zh: /credit 卡的 CCC−IG 解壓縮旗標 ON——最軟的融資層在部位滿載時開始重新定價。
crack_tells.align_note: 對齊 /credit 2026-07-02:CCC−IG 解壓縮旗標 ON(composite 41.6 LEVERING)

crack_tells.detail_en: VIX÷VIX3M at 0.913 vs the 0.95 trigger line for vol-target de-leveraging.
crack_tells.detail_zh: VIX÷VIX3M 目前 0.913,vol-target 去槓桿的引線在 0.95。

crack_tells.detail_en: Equity put/call 10d at 0.69 (None/4w) — a hedging bid returning through 0.7 while indices hold is the crack tell.
crack_tells.detail_zh: 股票 put/call 10 日 0.69(4 週 None)——指數未跌而比值升破 0.7,就是裂紋訊號。

positioning_read.summary_en: Composite 55.3 = crowded, but the crowding is professional, not universal. NAAIM 92.5 (89.8th pctl) and margin debt +18% YoY (75th pctl) show leveraged and active books near max exposure. Contrast the retail/survey side: AAII spread only +8.4pp (56th) — lukewarm, not euphoric — and equity put/call 0.69 (48th) shows no protection-buying panic yet. The tell: COT NQ net short at -9.1k (3.8th pctl!) — futures fast-money is actually LIGHT and fading (chg -3.1/4w), diverging from the exposure surveys. So real-money is loaded while hedgers/CTAs are cautious. VIX/VIX3M 0.913 (contango, calm). SOXX rel-vol 1.19 (72nd) confirms semi rotation crowding. Margin debt is ~2 months stale (Apr 30); band percentiles are estimates.
positioning_read.summary_zh: 綜合55.3屬擁擠，但屬「專業擁擠」而非全民狂熱。NAAIM 92.5（89.8百分位）、融資餘額+18% YoY（75百分位）顯示槓桿與主動機構近滿倉。對照散戶端：AAII僅+8.4pp（56百分位）不算亢奮，股票put/call 0.69（48百分位）尚無避險恐慌。關鍵背離：COT NQ淨空-9.1k（僅3.8百分位！）且續減（4週-3.1），期貨快錢其實偏輕，與曝險調查分歧。即真錢滿倉、對沖/CTA審慎。VIX/VIX3M 0.913仍為正價差（平靜）。SOXX相對量1.19（72百分位）確認半導體輪動擁擠。融資數據約落後2個月（4/30）；帶狀百分位為估值。

unwind_queue.player_en: Leveraged money — margin debt, vol-target & CTA
unwind_queue.player_zh: 槓桿資金 — 融資、波動目標與CTA
unwind_queue.trigger_en: VIX/VIX3M inverts ≥1.0 (now 0.913); a >20% single-week realized-vol jump forces mechanical de-gross regardless of view. Margin debt +18% YoY is the fuel.
unwind_queue.trigger_zh: VIX/VIX3M倒掛≥1.0（現0.913）；單週已實現波動跳升逾20%即觸發機械式去槓桿，不問觀點。融資+18% YoY為燃料。

unwind_queue.player_zh: 主動機構 — 共同與對沖基金
unwind_queue.trigger_en: Momentum break, not valuation: NAAIM slipping below 70 (from 92.5) signals the turn within a week; COT confirms within two. Watch the 92.5→sub-80 move.
unwind_queue.trigger_zh: 看動能斷裂而非估值：NAAIM由92.5跌破70一週內示警，COT兩週內確認。留意92.5→80以下的下滑。

unwind_queue.player_zh: 散戶 — 現金與選擇權
unwind_queue.trigger_en: Late but sudden: dip-buying persists until put/call spikes above 0.80 (now 0.69) and AAII flips negative. Flip shows in flow/vol, not surveys.
unwind_queue.trigger_zh: 晚但突然：逢低承接持續到put/call衝破0.80（現0.69）、AAII轉負為止。翻轉見於流量與量能，非調查。

unwind_queue.trigger_en: Bid vanishes on schedule: buyback blackout windows (pre-earnings) remove the price-insensitive bid exactly as earnings risk peaks; insider mega-sale clusters add supply.
unwind_queue.trigger_zh: 買盤照表消失：庫藏股封閉窗（財報前）在財報風險高峰移除價格不敏感買盤；內部人大額集中賣出增加供給。

unwind_queue.trigger_en: Sells last, only on net redemptions — but then dumps the same few AI mega-caps regardless of price, amplifying the concentration unwind.
unwind_queue.trigger_zh: 最後才賣，僅在淨贖回時——一旦發生便不計價拋售同幾檔AI巨頭，放大集中度反轉。

tsmc_view.summary_en: Positioning is not demand — no wafer order changes because CTAs de-gross. What it sets is the violence of the AI-narrative repricing. At 55.3 crowded-rising with leverage loaded (margin +18%), a vol trigger produces a fast 8–15% air-pocket. The real transmission to TSMC runs through /credit: the decompression flag is already ON (CCC−IG composite 41.6 LEVERING), so a forced-seller cascade would shut financing windows for the debt-funded AI buildout, and customers freeze data-center capex commitments before any order is cut. Watch positioning as the fuse that lights the credit fuse — the sequence is vol spike → leverage unwind → spread widening → customer expansion decisions paused → order-book softness with a multi-quarter lag.
tsmc_view.summary_zh: 部位不是需求——CTA去槓桿不會改變任何晶圓訂單。它決定的是AI敘事重新定價的暴力程度。55.3擁擠上升且槓桿滿載（融資+18%），一旦波動觸發即產生快速8–15%的空氣口袋。對台積電的真正傳導經由/credit：解壓縮旗標已ON（CCC−IG綜合41.6 LEVERING），強制賣壓連鎖將關閉舉債式AI建置的融資窗口，客戶在砍單前先凍結資料中心資本支出承諾。將部位視為點燃信用引信的引信——順序為波動跳升→槓桿反轉→利差走闊→客戶擴張決策暫停→訂單簿走弱（多季度滯後）。

thesis.direction_en: Positioning risk is elevated and building (crowded_rising), but not yet at cascade — professional books are full while retail and COT futures are not confirming, and only 1/3 crack tells is on. Two-sided: the crowding is real enough that any VIX inversion detonates a leveraged flush, yet the retail/COT divergence means the top isn't fully distributed. Confidence MEDIUM: positioning and trend agree (both loaded and rising), but crack tells disagree (1/3, below the 2 threshold) and COT diverges hard.
thesis.direction_zh: 部位風險偏高且續增（擁擠上升），但尚未進入連鎖——專業帳戶滿倉而散戶與COT期貨未確認，裂痕訊號僅1/3開啟。雙向：擁擠已足以在任何VIX倒掛時引爆槓桿去化，但散戶/COT背離意味頂部尚未完全派發。信心中等：部位與趨勢一致（皆滿載且上升），但裂痕訊號分歧（1/3，低於2門檻）且COT強烈背離。

leading_signals.en: VIX/VIX3M term structure toward 1.0 inversion (now 0.913) — fastest fuse; daily.
leading_signals.zh: VIX/VIX3M期限結構趨向1.0倒掛（現0.913）——最快引信；每日。

leading_signals.en: Equity put/call breaking above 0.80 (now 0.69) — protection-buying flip.
leading_signals.zh: 股票put/call突破0.80（現0.69）——避險買盤翻轉。

leading_signals.en: NAAIM dropping below 70 from 92.5 — active-manager de-risk within a week.
leading_signals.zh: NAAIM由92.5跌破70——主動經理一週內去風險。

leading_signals.en: /credit CCC−IG spread widening further from the ON decompression flag — financing-window closure.
leading_signals.zh: /credit CCC−IG利差自ON解壓縮旗標進一步走闊——融資窗口關閉。

leading_signals.en: COT NQ turning from -9.1k net short back toward net long as fast-money chases — completes the crowd (slowest, weekly).
leading_signals.zh: COT NQ由-9.1k淨空翻回淨多，快錢追漲——擁擠完成（最慢，每週）。

scenarios.trigger_en: NAAIM stays >85, put/call <0.60, VIX ratio <0.90 — no vol trigger; drawdowns stay <5%.
VIX/VIX3M inverts ≥1.0 → vol-target/CTA forced selling → 8–15% air-pocket in weeks; COT unwinds >1yr of build; ends when leverage is out.
scenarios.trigger_zh: VIX/VIX3M倒掛≥1.0→波動目標/CTA強制賣出→數週內8–15%空氣口袋；COT反轉逾一年建倉；槓桿出清即止。

scenarios.trigger_en: Contained 5–8% pullback takes COT below 3y median and put/call above 0.80 — positioning resets, AI fundamentals unchanged.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 受控5–8%回檔使COT跌破3年中位、put/call升破0.80——部位重置，AI基本面不變。

scenarios.trigger_en: Insider mega-sales cluster + buyback blackouts + AAII >+25pp euphoria while NAAIM slips below 70 — smart money hands to late money.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 內部人大額集中賣出+庫藏股封閉窗+AAII>+25pp亢奮，同時NAAIM跌破70——聰明錢派發給遲來錢。

falsification.en: COT NQ climbs back to net long above 3y median AND put/call falls below 0.55 with VIX staying in contango — would prove the '-9.1k light futures' divergence resolved bullishly, not crowded.
falsification.zh: COT NQ回升至3年中位以上淨多，且put/call跌破0.55、VIX維持正價差——證明「-9.1k期貨偏輕」背離以偏多而非擁擠方式收斂。

falsification.en: A 5%+ drop in the index occurs with NO leveraged cascade (VIX ratio never inverts, margin debt keeps rising) — falsifies the mechanical unwind-queue ordering.
falsification.zh: 指數跌逾5%卻無槓桿連鎖（VIX比率從未倒掛、融資餘額續增）——推翻機械式反轉順序。

falsification.en: /credit decompression flag flips OFF (CCC−IG re-tightens) while equities rise — breaks the positioning→financing-window transmission thesis.
falsification.zh: /credit解壓縮旗標翻OFF（CCC−IG重新收窄）而股市上漲——打破部位→融資窗口傳導論點。

early_warning.en: VIX/VIX3M term structure (now 0.913) approaching/crossing 1.0 — the mechanical trigger.
early_warning.zh: VIX/VIX3M期限結構（現0.913）逼近/突破1.0——機械觸發點。

early_warning.en: Equity put/call 10d (now 0.69) breaking above 0.80 — retail protection flip.
early_warning.zh: 股票put/call 10日（現0.69）突破0.80——散戶避險翻轉。

early_warning.en: /credit CCC−IG spread direction off the ON decompression flag — financing-window tell.
early_warning.zh: /credit CCC−IG利差方向（自ON解壓縮旗標）——融資窗口訊號。

early_warning.en: NAAIM exposure (now 92.5) dropping below 80 then 70 — active de-risk.
early_warning.zh: NAAIM曝險（現92.5）跌破80再破70——主動去風險。

early_warning.en: COT NQ net position (now -9.1k) — direction of fast-money rebuild or capitulation.
early_warning.zh: COT NQ淨部位（現-9.1k）——快錢重建或投降方向。

early_warning.en: AAII bull-bear spread (now +8.4pp) spiking toward +25pp euphoria — distribution-top tell.
early_warning.zh: AAII多空差（現+8.4pp）飆向+25pp亢奮——派發頂部訊號。

early_warning.en: FINRA margin debt YoY (now +18%, ~2mo stale) — leverage-fuel gauge; note the lag.
early_warning.zh: FINRA融資餘額YoY（現+18%，約落後2個月）——槓桿燃料計；注意滯後。

player_map.name_en: Leveraged money — margin debt, vol-target & CTA funds
player_map.name_zh: 槓桿資金 — 融資餘額、vol-target 與 CTA
player_map.holds_en: Borrowed conviction: FINRA margin debt near record, systematic funds whose equity exposure is a mechanical function of volatility.
player_map.holds_zh: 借來的信仰:FINRA 融資餘額接近歷史高位,系統性基金的股票曝險是波動率的機械函數。
player_map.unwind_en: Sells FIRST and mechanically — margin calls and vol-target de-leveraging do not ask for a view. A VIX spike is the trigger, not the news that caused it.
player_map.unwind_zh: 最先賣、而且是機械式的——追繳與 vol-target 去槓桿不問觀點。觸發器是 VIX 跳升本身,不是造成它的新聞。
player_map.watch_en: FINRA margin debt (2-month lag), VIX term structure (^VIX/^VIX3M).
player_map.watch_zh: FINRA 融資餘額(落後兩個月)、VIX 期限結構(^VIX/^VIX3M)。

player_map.name_zh: 主動機構 — 共同基金/避險基金(COT/13F 類)
player_map.holds_en: Benchmark-constrained overweights in the AI complex; momentum-following futures overlays visible in CFTC COT.
player_map.holds_zh: 受基準約束、對 AI 集群的超配;追動能的期貨部位可在 CFTC COT 看到。
player_map.unwind_en: Sells second — de-risks when momentum breaks, not when valuation argues. NAAIM shows the turn within a week; COT within two.
player_map.unwind_zh: 第二個賣——動能斷裂時降風險,而不是估值說了算。NAAIM 一週內、COT 兩週內就會顯形。
player_map.watch_en: CFTC COT NQ net non-commercial, NAAIM exposure. (13F is quarterly + 45-day lag — declared out of the free tier.)
player_map.watch_zh: CFTC COT 那斯達克期貨投機淨部位、NAAIM 曝險。(13F 為季度+45 天落後——宣告不在免費層內。)

player_map.name_zh: 散戶 — 現金與選擇權
player_map.holds_en: Buy-the-dip reflex plus a 0DTE call tilt; sentiment surveys read the mood, put/call reads the wallet.
player_map.holds_zh: 逢低買進反射動作加上 0DTE 買權傾斜;問卷讀心情,put/call 讀錢包。
player_map.unwind_en: Sells late but suddenly — dip-buying works until it doesn't; the flip shows up in put/call and volume, not in surveys.
player_map.unwind_zh: 賣得晚、但翻臉很快——逢低買進有效到失效為止;翻轉先出現在 put/call 與量,不在問卷。
player_map.watch_en: AAII bull-bear spread, CBOE equity put/call, QQQ volume share (proxy).
player_map.watch_zh: AAII 多空差、CBOE 股票 put/call、QQQ 量能占比(代理)。

player_map.holds_en: Insiders sell into strength (informational); buybacks are the market's steadiest marginal bid.
player_map.holds_zh: 內部人逢高賣出(帶資訊含量);庫藏股是市場最穩定的邊際買盤。
player_map.unwind_en: Does not 'sell' the market — the bid disappears on schedule: buyback blackout windows remove it exactly when earnings risk peaks.
player_map.unwind_zh: 不是「賣出」市場——而是買盤按行事曆消失:庫藏股靜默期恰好在財報風險最高時抽走買單。
player_map.watch_en: Insider-sales tone (qualitative, see dictionary), buyback blackout calendar.
player_map.watch_zh: 內部人賣股基調(定性,見字典)、庫藏股靜默期行事曆。

player_map.holds_en: Holds by construction — index concentration means the AI names ARE the index; no view, no discretion.
player_map.holds_zh: 按規則持有——指數集中度使 AI 權值股就是指數本身;沒有觀點、沒有裁量。
player_map.unwind_en: Sells LAST and only on net redemptions — but when it does, it sells the same few AI names regardless of price.
player_map.unwind_zh: 最後才賣、且只因淨贖回——但一旦賣,就是不計價格地賣同樣那幾檔 AI 權值股。
player_map.watch_en: Fund-flow reports (weekly ICI / ETF flows — partially outside the free tier).
player_map.watch_zh: 基金流向報告(ICI 週報 / ETF 流向——部分在免費層之外)。

indicator_dictionary.name_zh: CFTC COT — 那斯達克期貨投機淨部位
indicator_dictionary.what_en: Net long minus short of non-commercial (speculative) traders in NASDAQ-100 e-mini futures, weekly official CFTC data.
indicator_dictionary.what_zh: 那斯達克 100 e-mini 期貨中非商業(投機)交易者的淨多減淨空,CFTC 每週官方數據。
indicator_dictionary.why_en: The only FREE direct read on institutional futures positioning — the blind spot /flows declares.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: 免費層唯一能直接看到機構期貨部位的數據——正是 /flows 聲明的盲點。
indicator_dictionary.threshold_zh: >3 年 85 百分位 = 投機資金單邊做多。

indicator_dictionary.what_en: Weekly survey of US individual investors: % bullish minus % bearish (6-month view).
indicator_dictionary.what_zh: 美國散戶每週問卷:看多比例減看空比例(六個月展望)。
indicator_dictionary.why_en: Retail mood; extremes are contrarian. A LUKEWARM read while institutions are full is the 'professional crowding' tell.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: 散戶情緒;極端值反向。當機構滿倉而散戶問卷溫吞,就是「專業擁擠」的訊號。

indicator_dictionary.what_en: Weekly average equity exposure reported by active investment managers (can exceed 100 via leverage).
indicator_dictionary.what_zh: 主動型經理人回報的平均股票曝險(可因槓桿超過 100)。
indicator_dictionary.why_en: The fastest weekly read on whether active managers are fully invested.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: 最快的每週指標,回答主動機構是否已經滿倉。

indicator_dictionary.what_en: Monthly debit balances in customers' securities margin accounts; we score the YoY growth rate.
indicator_dictionary.what_zh: 客戶保證金帳戶的融資餘額(月頻);本卡對「年增率」計分。
indicator_dictionary.why_en: The leverage layer in dollars. Rapid growth = borrowed buying that must reverse mechanically in a drawdown.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: 槓桿層的美元數字。快速成長 = 借來的買盤,回檔時必然機械式反轉。
indicator_dictionary.threshold_en: >+25% YoY historically precedes violent flushes. Published with a ~2-month lag — honestly stale.
indicator_dictionary.threshold_zh: 年增 >25% 歷史上常先於猛烈洗倉。發布落後約兩個月——誠實標註它是舊的。

indicator_dictionary.name_zh: CBOE 股票 put/call 比(10 日)
indicator_dictionary.what_en: 10-day average of equity put volume over call volume.
indicator_dictionary.what_zh: 股票賣權量除以買權量的 10 日平均。
indicator_dictionary.why_en: Reads the options wallet, not the survey mouth. Very low = call-chasing complacency (crowded).
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: 讀的是選擇權錢包,不是問卷嘴巴。極低 = 追買權的自滿(擁擠)。
indicator_dictionary.threshold_en: <0.50 = crowded calls; a rise through 0.70 while indices hold = hedging bid returning (crack tell).
indicator_dictionary.threshold_zh: <0.50 = 買權擁擠;若指數未跌而比值升破 0.70 = 避險買盤回歸(裂紋訊號)。

indicator_dictionary.what_en: Spot VIX over 3-month VIX. Deep contango (<0.85) = complacency; ≥1.0 inversion = stress now.
indicator_dictionary.what_zh: 即期 VIX 除以三個月 VIX。深度正價差(<0.85)= 自滿;≥1.0 倒掛 = 當下壓力。
indicator_dictionary.why_en: The trigger wire for vol-target and CTA de-leveraging — the first player in the unwind queue.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: vol-target 與 CTA 去槓桿的引線——解倉隊列裡的第一個玩家。
indicator_dictionary.threshold_en: Ratio ≥0.95 = the mechanical sellers' finger moves to the trigger.
indicator_dictionary.threshold_zh: 比值 ≥0.95 = 機械賣家的手指已放到扳機上。

indicator_dictionary.what_en: Qualitative: are AI-complex insiders selling into strength (Form 4 clusters, 10b5-1 step-ups)?
indicator_dictionary.what_zh: 定性:AI 集群的內部人是否逢高加速賣股(Form 4 群聚、10b5-1 加碼)?
indicator_dictionary.why_en: The most informed player map layer; no free structured feed, so it stays a dictionary entry + news radar item, NOT a scored input.
indicator_dictionary.why_zh: 玩家地圖裡資訊含量最高的一層;免費層沒有結構化來源,故僅列入字典與新聞雷達,不進入計分。
indicator_dictionary.threshold_en: Clustered mega-sales at highs while buybacks pause = distribution tell.
indicator_dictionary.threshold_zh: 高檔群聚性大額賣出且庫藏股暫停 = 出貨訊號。

credit_decompression.align_note: 對齊 /credit 2026-07-02:CCC−IG 解壓縮旗標 ON(composite 41.6 LEVERING)
credit_decompression.note_en: The key nuance pairing: crowded positioning is survivable while credit is calm — crowded positioning WHILE the bottom of the credit stack decompresses is the dangerous combination.
credit_decompression.note_zh: 關鍵配對:信用平靜時擁擠還撐得住——但信用結構最底層開始解壓縮時的擁擠,才是危險組合。

aibubble_market.align_note: 對齊 /aibubble 2026-07-02:market 64.6 過熱(僅引用作脈絡,不進入計分)
aibubble_market.note_en: Context only, not a scored input: /aibubble reads temperature (valuation/heat); this card reads crowdedness (who is already in).
aibubble_market.note_zh: 僅作脈絡、不進入計分:/aibubble 讀的是溫度(估值/熱度),本卡讀的是擁擠度(誰已經進場)。

blind_spots_en: CFTC COT covers futures only — the cash equity and options complex (where much of the AI trade lives) is invisible to it.
AAII is a small self-selected retail survey; it reads mood, not money. We weight it lowest among the scored inputs.
FINRA margin debt publishes with a ~2-month lag — the freshest print is genuinely old news and is labeled as such.
13F institutional holdings are quarterly + 45-day lag — declared OUT of the free tier rather than laundered in as fresh.
3-year percentiles on curated bands are ESTIMATES; only the COT percentile is computed from true fetched history on live refresh.
Volume-based proxies (QQQ/SPY, SOXX) measure attention and turnover, not positions — they can be high in both accumulation and distribution.
0DTE options flow — the fastest-moving retail/leverage layer — has no free structured source and is only visible here via put/call and news.
blind_spots_zh: CFTC COT 僅涵蓋期貨——現貨與選擇權部位(AI 交易的大宗所在)在它眼裡是看不見的。
AAII 是小樣本自選散戶問卷;讀的是心情不是錢。在計分輸入中我們給它最低權重。
FINRA 融資餘額發布落後約兩個月——最新一筆其實是舊聞,本卡如實標註。
13F 機構持股為季度+45 天落後——直接宣告不在免費層,而不是洗成新數據混進來。
策展區間上的 3 年百分位是估計值;只有 COT 百分位在即時刷新時用真實歷史計算。
量能類代理(QQQ/SPY、SOXX)衡量注意力與換手,不是部位——吸籌與出貨階段都可能偏高。
0DTE 選擇權流——最快的散戶/槓桿層——沒有免費結構化來源,本卡只能透過 put/call 與新聞間接看到。
